items.summary: Update the backend Motoko invoice data model to include two new fields: `paidAmount` (the amount paid so far, a numeric value) and `balanceAmount` (automatically calculated as total minus paidAmount). The `createInvoice` function should accept `paidAmount` as an optional input (defaulting to 0), and `balanceAmount` should be stored as `total - paidAmount`.

Update the Create Invoice page form to include a 'Paid Amount' input field. As the user types the paid amount, display a read-only 'Balance Due' field that auto-calculates as (total - paid amount). Both fields should appear in the totals section below the line items, styled consistently with the existing amber/teal theme.

Update the Invoice Detail page and the printable invoice layout to display the 'Paid Amount' and 'Balance Due' fields. These should appear in the totals/summary section of the invoice detail view and in the printed invoice output generated by the InvoicePrintHeader/printable area. Style consistently with the existing theme; both fields should be visible on-screen and in the printed layout.

Update the Invoice List page and Dashboard summary stats to reflect the new paid/balance amounts where relevant. On the Invoice List, optionally show balance due in the table. On the Dashboard, ensure revenue or payment stats are consistent with the introduction of partial payments (paidAmount vs total).
